phases.name: Launch Pad
phases.theme: Build the portfolio site, learn git
phases.mindsetShift: From consumer to creator — the first thing I ship is the place where everything else will live.

projects.name: Portfolio Site
projects.description: Next.js portfolio deployed on Vercel — the foundation for everything.

phases.name: The Language of Production
phases.theme: Specs, user stories, PRDs — writing things engineers actually build from
phases.mindsetShift: My clarity is the product. A spec is a contract between someone who understands the problem and someone who will solve it.

projects.name: AI-Powered CV Screening — Feature Spec
projects.description: Full spec for adding AI candidate screening to Factorial's ATS. User stories, acceptance criteria, edge cases.

projects.name: Interview Scheduling 2.0 — PRD
projects.description: One-page PRD for improving scheduling in the ATS. Problem, options, recommendation, success metrics.

projects.name: Talent Pool Revival — Integration Spec
projects.description: Spec for re-engaging 3+ year old candidates against current open roles. Data model, matching logic, GDPR constraints.

phases.name: First AI Tools
phases.mindsetShift: I don't need to understand every line of code. I need to understand what I'm building, why, and how to direct AI to build it with me.

projects.name: JD Bias Detector
projects.description: Paste a job description → get analysis of biased language, gendered terms, and improvement suggestions.

projects.name: CV + JD Matcher
projects.description: Paste a CV and a JD → get a match score (0–100) with gaps and strengths explained.

projects.name: Interview Question Generator
projects.description: Input role + seniority + key skills → structured interview questions tailored to the role.

phases.name: The Plumbing Layer
phases.theme: APIs, webhooks, and how systems talk to each other
phases.mindsetShift: I don't need to build the API. I need to understand it well enough to spec integrations engineers can build — and to recognize when a trade-off should matter to me.

projects.name: ATS API Explorer
projects.description: Postman deep-dive into Greenhouse ATS sandbox API. Documented findings: what data lives in an ATS, what's missing.

projects.name: Candidate Journey — Webhook Architecture
projects.description: System diagram: candidate applies → auto-email → TA notified if qualified → hiring manager weekly digest.

projects.name: n8n Automation: Final Round Trigger
projects.description: When candidate moves to Final Round → calendar hold created → Slack message sent to TA coordinator.

phases.name: Agents & RAG
phases.theme: AI that knows things — retrieval-augmented generation and multi-step agents
phases.mindsetShift: AI without context is guessing. AI with the right context is leverage.

projects.name: TA Handbook Assistant
projects.description: RAG chatbot that answers questions about a TA handbook. Built with Vercel AI SDK + Supabase vector store.

projects.name: Candidate Screener Agent
projects.description: Multi-step agent: takes a JD → reads CVs → scores each → writes recruiter recommendation.

projects.name: Human-in-the-Loop Design
projects.description: Human review gate for the candidate screener. Spec + UI design for the approval step.

phases.name: The Capstone
phases.mindsetShift: This is mine. I specced it, I built it, I can demo it in three minutes.

projects.name: TA AI Assistant v1.0
projects.description: Full product: input a JD + upload CVs → match scores + gap analysis + draft outreach for top candidate. Deployed on Vercel.
